html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Gorge

The Mealing Stone is a structure exclusive to The Gorge event in Don't Starve Together. It is located in the town rubble area. It is used to grind Wheat into Flour, Salt Crystals into Salt, and Spotty Sprigs into Spot Spice.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đá Ăn là một công trình dành riêng cho sự kiện The Gorge trong Don't Starve Together. Nó nằm trong khu vực đổ nát của thị trấn. Nó được sử dụng để nghiền Lúa mì thành Bột, Tinh thể muối thành Muối và Cành cây Đốm thành Gia vị.

The '''Mealing Stone''' is a structure exclusive to [[The Gorge]] [[:Category:Events|event]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is located in the town rubble area. It is used to grind [[Wheat]] into [[Flour]], [[Salt Crystals#The Gorge|Salt Crystals]] into [[Salt]], and [[Spotty Sprig]]s into [[Spot Spice]].

== Recipes ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Wheat
|count1 = 2
|tool = Mealing Stone
|result = Flour}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Salt Crystals (Gorge)
|count1 = 1
|tool = Mealing Stone
|result = Salt
|resultcount = 3}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Spotty Sprig
|count1 = 3
|tool = Mealing Stone
|result = Spot Spice}}
